// Overtinked: Reading order: every // key is documentation; the following keys are real settings in the same order. Nested objects use // lines first, then values.
// MaxTries: Max number of tinkers allowed per item (recipe check uses MaxTries - 1).
// Scale: Difficulty step between each extra tinker tier.
// MaxImbueEffects: Max imbue effects allowed on an item (checked via bit count of ImbuedEffect).
// EnableWorkmanshipImbueFallback: If GetRecipe is null but target has workmanship and source is Overtinked imbue/salvage/buffed jewelry, inject tinkering shell or mutation-matched recipe. EA awakening uses ItemWorkmanship — Hemorrhage/Shatter gates now honor that too.
// WorkmanshipSalvageFallbackShellRecipe: Fallback world recipe id when mutation scan misses or source has no DataId map (Cleaving/Nether/etc.). 0 = skip shell; default 4452 (same family as Hemorrhage template).
// WorkmanshipImbueMutationRecipeScanMin: Inclusive min recipe id when building DataId → recipe index for standard imbue salvages.
// WorkmanshipImbueMutationRecipeScanMax: Inclusive max recipe id for that scan.
// EnableRecipeManagerPatch: When true, patches RecipeManager.UseObjectOnTarget (and related) for tinkering flow.
// SalvageRules: Per-salvage rules: FixedValue/Min/Max + EffectKind = server math (no SQL). Optional EffectSummaryFormat, BankEffectFormat, BankDescriptionFormat on each entry — string.Format InvariantCulture: {0}=magnitude, {1}=signed, {2}=Name, {3}=EffectKind. /bank hints by material name use Name match (e.g. Steel).
// EnableFailureRedesign: When true, failed tinkers apply chaotic positive effects instead of destroying the item.
// EnableDefaultImbueFailureWorkmanship: When true, failed imbue tinkers add +1 Workmanship instead of destroying the item, capped at 10.
// ChaosDamageShuffleBonusPercent: Failure-redesign damage shuffle: additive percent to one rolled combat stat (5 = +0.05).
// ChaosOverchargeMultiplierMaxExclusive: Overcharge: Random.Next exclusive high (default 6 → multipliers 2-5 with Min 2).
// HemorrhageImbue: Hemorrhage imbue (e.g. Salvaged Yellow Garnet 21087). Legacy key BleedImbue still loads. Inside: // lines first, then values.
// ShatterImbue: Shatter imbue: set SalvageWcids to your custom salvage; creature stacks use FakeInt 40134/40135.
// BuffedImbueRules: Buffed jewelry imbues. Each array element: // keys first, then values.
// ShowPlayerSalvageMessage: When true, send the player a short message when a custom salvage/imbue is applied.
// DefenseImbueBonus: Multiplier on vanilla defense-imbue skill add (imbued-piece count). 0 = vanilla (+1 per piece). 5 = +5 per piece (two pieces => +10).
// OverrideDefenseSalvageLongDescInAppra: When true and DefenseImbueBonus > 0, examine LongDesc for defense salvage WCIDs uses the format strings below (no SQL needed to change displayed bonus).
// OverrideNumericSalvageBagLongDescInAp: When true, examine LongDesc for numeric SalvageRules bags (TinkeringMaterial) follows live JSON (BankDescriptionFormat or built-in effect + optional bane line). Defense bags keep priority.
// MergeSalvageTinkerEffectIntoBroadcast: When true with ShowPlayerSalvageMessage, append effect/bane summary to the single local tinkering broadcast instead of extra craft lines.
// DefenseSalvageLongDescSalvagedFormat: Optional. {0} = DefenseImbueBonus, {1} = Melee|Missile|Magic. Empty = built-in English for salvaged bags.
// DefenseSalvageLongDescFoolproofFormat: Optional. Same placeholders for foolproof Peridot/Topaz/Zircon. Empty = built-in English.
// EnableLesserImbueUpgradeToFull: Strip weaker effects before imbue: IgnoreArmor (armor cleaving) for Sunstone; CriticalFrequency (biting strike) for Black Opal; CriticalMultiplier (crushing-style) for Fire Opal; ResistanceModifier* for matching rending salvage.

SalvageRules.// Wcids: Both normal and quest-reward WCIDs so behavior is consistent.
SalvageRules.// EffectKind: Kind of effect: Damage, ArmorLevel, etc.
SalvageRules.// MinValue: Random range low (inclusive). Ignored if FixedValue is set.
SalvageRules.// FixedValue: If set, use this value instead of rolling.
SalvageRules.// Enabled: When false, this salvage rule is skipped.
SalvageRules.// BaneSpellIds: Optional: spell IDs to apply or upgrade on success.
SalvageRules.// EffectSummaryFormat: Optional craft chat override; placeholders {0}-{3} — see root SalvageRules doc.
SalvageRules.Name: Iron

HemorrhageImbue.// SalvageWcids: Salvage WCIDs that apply this imbue.
HemorrhageImbue.// Enabled: When false, this imbue type is disabled.
HemorrhageImbue.// StacksPerApplication: Stacks added to primary and each AoE victim per hit.
HemorrhageImbue.// AoERadiusYards: Radius in yards (×0.9144 for distance check). Default 10. When 0, AoERadiusMeters is used.
HemorrhageImbue.// DamagePerStackPerTick: Health damage per stack per wave (1 = N hits of 1 for N stacks).
HemorrhageImbue.// StaggerBetweenHitsSeconds: Delay between each 1-damage hit within a wave.
HemorrhageImbue.// BaseRecipeId: World recipe id when GetRecipe has no match (vanilla omits yellow garnet). Default 4452 (Red Garnet imbue).
HemorrhageImbue.Name: Hemorrhage

CleavingImbue.// SalvageWcids: Salvage WCIDs that apply this imbue.
CleavingImbue.// Enabled: When false, this imbue type is disabled.
CleavingImbue.// SplashDamageFraction: Portion of primary hit damage per splash target.
CleavingImbue.// MaxSplashTargets: Cap on extra targets per swing.
CleavingImbue.// SplashDamagePlayerVictims: When false, cleave never damages players.
CleavingImbue.// SplashDamageCapPerTarget: Cap raw splash damage per target; 0 = no cap.
CleavingImbue.Name: Cleaving

NetherRendingImbue.// SalvageWcids: Salvage WCIDs that apply this imbue.
NetherRendingImbue.// Enabled: When false, this imbue type is disabled.
NetherRendingImbue.// NetherDamageFraction: Portion of primary final damage as Nether.
NetherRendingImbue.// MaxNetherBonusDamage: Cap Nether bonus per swing; 0 = no cap.
NetherRendingImbue.// NetherBonusSoftCap: Soft cap on Nether bonus; 0 = none.
NetherRendingImbue.Name: Nether Rending

ShatterImbue.// SalvageWcids: Salvage WCIDs that apply Shatter to melee/missile weapons.
ShatterImbue.// Enabled: When false, Shatter imbue and combat are disabled.
ShatterImbue.// BaseRecipeId: World recipe id when GetRecipe has no match (default 4452).
ShatterImbue.// StacksPerHit: Stacks added to creature per hit.
ShatterImbue.// MaxStacks: Stack cap; at cap target counts as broken for extra damage fraction.
ShatterImbue.// DamageBonusPerStack: Additive multiplier per stack on target before hit (0.2 = +20% per stack).
ShatterImbue.// BrokenDamageBonusFraction: Extra fraction when target broken (0.5 = +50% to hit, all damage types from Shatter weapon).
ShatterImbue.Name: Shatter

JewelryCleaveImbue.// SalvageWcids: Salvage WCIDs that apply this imbue (Obsidian = 21063).
JewelryCleaveImbue.// Enabled: When false, this imbue type is disabled.
JewelryCleaveImbue.// BonusTargets: Number of extra cleave targets granted. ACE subtracts 1 internally.
JewelryCleaveImbue.Name: Jewelry Cleave

BuffedImbueRules.// Enabled: When false, this rule is skipped.
BuffedImbueRules.Name: Hematite

// DebugCraftInventorySync: When true, log [CraftInventorySync] line per tinkering CreateDestroyItems (modified set, target in set, wield, in MyInventory).
// MirrorRecipeUpdateObjAfterOvertinkedS: When true, second UpdateObj-style sync after successful tinkering if Overtinked short-circuited TryMutate. Default false (vanilla already updates once).
